name: ds-usgovbid
title: DealerScope — USGovBid Impound Vehicle Scraper
description: Scrapes impound and government surplus vehicle listings from usgovbid.com. Uses WordPress Events Calendar REST API to discover active auctions, then Playwright to load individual lot pages from bid.usgovbid.com (Maxanet platform).

input.title: USGovBid Scraper Input
input.description: Configuration for the USGovBid vehicle auction scraper

maxAuctions.title: Max Auctions
maxAuctions.description: Maximum number of auction events to process

maxLotsPerAuction.title: Max Lots Per Auction
maxLotsPerAuction.description: Maximum number of lots to fetch per auction

minBid.title: Minimum Bid ($)
minBid.description: Skip lots with current bid below this amount

maxBid.title: Maximum Bid ($)
maxBid.description: Skip lots with current bid above this amount
